query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.supplierName, s.status,
  s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.dataSource,
  s.customerExternalId,
  c.name as customerName,
  s.providerServiceCode, s.address
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE s.supplierName LIKE '%Vocus%' 
   OR s.providerServiceCode IN ('BU278922','BU278923','BU290126','BU291154','BU301770','BU312372','BU123907155','BU123970473')
   OR s.planName LIKE '%BU2%' OR s.planName LIKE '%BU1%'
ORDER BY s.supplierName, s.status;
